markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content quality, process, and Phase 2 decision.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Shift:** For major AI errors (e.g., conflating "configuration as code" with "MDM configuration profiles"), the new workflow is to flag the draft for a full rewrite, not to perform extensive manual edits.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Phase 2 Decision:** The decision is due this week. John Jeremiah and Brock Walters strongly support continuing, citing the program's value and GrowthX's responsiveness. Ashish is the final approver.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Public Drafts Risk:** Publicly hosting unvetted drafts in the GitHub repo risks crawlers indexing incorrect information. The agreed solution is to delete any draft that will not be published.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Future Vision:** John Jeremiah proposed a long-term vision to build a comprehensive, SEO-rich resource on the broader topic of MDM, not just Fleet-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** AI-generated drafts sometimes contain "hallucinations"—confidently incorrect content that conflates distinct technical concepts (e.g., "configuration as code" vs. "MDM configuration profiles").](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**Impact:** Correcting these errors requires extensive manual editing, which is time-consuming and risks undermining the article's SEO structure.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** For drafts with major errors or incompleteness, the new process is to flag them for a full rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX offers a fast (same-day/next-day) turnaround for revisions, making this more efficient than manual correction.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop:** John Jeremiah emphasized that feedback must improve the *process*, not just the individual article.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Method:** Use GitHub Pull Requests (PRs) for inline comments to provide specific, actionable feedback that helps GrowthX refine its AI inputs and human-editor guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce review time by systematically improving the content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Phase 2 Decision

  - [**Deadline:** The decision on whether to proceed with Phase 2 is due this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Support:** John Jeremiah and Brock Walters strongly advocate for continuing.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The program is a critical need, and GrowthX has been highly responsive to feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Ashish is the final decision-maker. John Jeremiah will connect Erik O'Brien with Ashish to discuss.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Public Drafts in GitHub

  - [**Concern:** Publicly hosting unvetted drafts in the GitHub repo creates a risk.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Scenario:** If a draft with significant errors (like the "configuration" example) is never published, it could still be indexed by search engines and LLMs, creating a source of public misinformation.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [**Solution:** Delete any draft from the public repo that will not be published.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This prevents incorrect information from being indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Constraint:** This requires a process change for Fleet, which typically closes issues rather than deleting them.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

### Technical SEO Audit

  - [**LLM Input Test:** The audit's finding that LLMs can read the homepage was surprising, as it was expected they would be blind to JavaScript-rendered content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Newer LLMs may be multi-modal and can now process such pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik O'Brien will investigate and report back.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [**Other Findings:** The audit's other technical SEO issues align with data from SEMrush and require attention.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John Jeremiah:** Connect Erik O'Brien with Ashish to discuss the Phase 2 decision.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien:** Investigate and report on the LLM's ability to read the JavaScript-rendered homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [**Brock Walters:** Implement the new workflow: flag drafts with major errors for a full rewrite instead of editing them.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**All:** Use GitHub PRs for inline feedback to improve the content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/Jqc1HR_XZQUbXy5tFKyoNiLdHUt52t1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
